name: pushout-spec
description: Quint formal model of the boxer pushout exchange protocol, crash-recovery layer, and convergence liveness

scripts.typecheck: for f in *.qnt; do quint typecheck "$f" || exit 1; done
scripts.test: for f in *.qnt; do quint test "$f" || exit 1; done
scripts.sweep: quint run pushout_exchange.qnt --invariant=Safety --max-steps=12 --max-samples=20000 && quint run crash_recovery.qnt --invariant=Safety --max-steps=14 --max-samples=20000 && quint run convergence.qnt --invariant=DepClosed --max-steps=18 --max-samples=20000 && quint run frontier_reconcile.qnt --invariant=Safety --max-steps=14 --max-samples=20000 && quint run erasure_vault.qnt --invariant=Safe --max-steps=12 --max-samples=20000
scripts.verify: quint verify pushout_exchange.qnt --invariant=Safety --max-steps=6 && quint verify crash_recovery.qnt --invariant=Safety --max-steps=12 && quint verify erasure_vault.qnt --invariant=Safe --max-steps=10
scripts.findings: quint run pushout_exchange.qnt --invariant=ErasureComplete --max-steps=8 ; quint run erasure_dilemma.qnt --invariant=EnvelopeAvailable --max-steps=6 ; quint run crash_recovery_unsafe.qnt --invariant=NoCorruption --max-steps=6 ; quint run crash_recovery_unsafe_snapshot.qnt --invariant=RecoveryCorrect --max-steps=6 ; quint run frontier_reconcile_unsafe.qnt --invariant=HeadsOnlySufficient --max-steps=1 ; quint run frontier_reconcile_unsafe.qnt --invariant=FrontierNeedsClosure --max-steps=1
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run sweep
